Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Video.summary: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Video.summary: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".
Video.title: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group C - 3

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: Don’t miss this inspiring wheelchair hybrid doubles match from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Adaptive athletes Rob Krizmanich, Michael Lipp, Patick Huletsky, and Jeff Sylvestre bring talent, teamwork, and tenacity to the court in a showcase of the sport’s inclusive future.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Video.summary: Straight from The Orchard at Jigsaw Health, Tuesday Night Pickleball brings you a high-octane women’s doubles matchup featuring four elite pros. Anna Bright and Jessie Irvine team up with firepower and finesse to take on the seasoned duo of Lucy Kovalova and Catherine Parenteau.From smart stacking and sharp cross-court dinks to quick hands battles and momentum swings, this match is packed with elite-level tactics and crowd-thrilling rallies. It’s classic TNP: fun, fiery, and full of flair.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
Tuesday Night Pickleball – August 2, 2022 – Women’s Doubles – Bright & Irvine vs Kovalova & Parentea
